name: bitbucket
description: Bitbucket Cloud repository operations — branches, commits, pull requests. Drop-in alternative to the GitHub adapter for teams on Bitbucket.

tools.name: bitbucket_create_branch
tools.description: Create a feature branch from mainbranch. Naming: '<type>/<KEY>-<desc>'.

tools.name: bitbucket_push_files
tools.description: Push file changes to a branch in one or more commits.

tools.name: bitbucket_open_pr
tools.description: Open a pull request. Title follows conventional commits. Body includes the validator report link.

tools.name: bitbucket_get_pr
tools.description: Fetch PR details including build status, reviewer state, and mergeable flag.

tools.name: bitbucket_merge_pr
tools.description: Merge a PR. BLOCKED for the deployer by the hook layer — only the user can merge.

envVars.name: BITBUCKET_EMAIL
envVars.description: Atlassian account email for the app password.

envVars.name: BITBUCKET_APP_PASSWORD
envVars.description: App password from id.atlassian.com → App passwords. Scopes: 'repository:write', 'pullrequest:write'.
